title: BMO Totems
description:
Rename a totem of unying to turn it into any of the 27 BMO variants you want.
❗NO MODS NEEDED❗⚔️ ADVENTURE TIME ⚔️
body:
# BMO Totems
### ⚙️ Info
- Compatible With: Vanilla Minecraft 1.21.5+ ✅
- Type: Custom Item Model, Renamed on the Anvil
- Doesn't has a [CIT Resewn]([https://modrinth.com/user/Super_Jose](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)) version yet. Still relying on 1.21.5+ vanilla feature.
### 📜 About
> caiosx22 here, and this pack is a totem version of [BMO companions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bmo-companions) pack to Vanilla Minecraft 1.21.5+.
All models and textures were made by [Super_Jose](https://modrinth.com/user/Super_Jose) who gave me the permition to use them in this pack, I just ported them to make a CIT totem pack and made some fixes and improvements.
### ⚠️ You need to know
> When Using CIT Resewn Texture packs, you can rename the items to pretty much anything that contains a certain word. **But not in vanilla**; you need to put **the exact same name** as the resourcepack says.
### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1

<summary>Preview</summary>

> Fixed the quiver strap from Robin Hood BMO, so now it wraps around the body instead of disappearing on the sides. I also added arrows more accurate to the episode in Robin Hood BMO's quiver. ↓
<details>
<summary>Preview</summary>

### Before and After
![Original Robin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d7d948c5f4d71aca0d18330cf98497027451cc.gif) ![New Robin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22610da88c6d04c66d7146653b0a53bfe062408a.gif)

</details>

> King BMO's crown needed to be repositioned, so I took advantage and made the crown's sides in 3D. Also the cloth from King BMO needed to have its rotation turned into 0 to be abble to be compattible without optifine. ↓
